_comment: Audit-campaign worktree permission allowlist (plan-proto-audit.md Phase 0 step 5). INERT TEMPLATE — takes effect only when a human copies it to <worktree>/.claude/settings.local.json. Grants the headless overnight runner: auto-accepted file edits in the campaign worktrees, plus git/node/npm/gh/powershell and read-only shell utilities without prompts. The Claude Code permission guard requires the human to apply this file; Claude may not.
